note: Every golden/replay hash declares the upstream SEMANTIC SURFACES it depends on and the surface version it was frozen against (bead y4pt). Surfaces declare a version const in source; xtask check-goldens fails when a source const drifts from this registry or a golden's pin drifts from a surface row - an upstream semantic change must point at every downstream golden to re-freeze deliberately, never surprise it. Re-pins follow docs/GOLDEN_POLICY.md (committed tree, BOTH debug and release, plausible root cause).

goldens.justification: 0xeef1_0550_7daf_c0d5 frozen 2026-07-09 after the powi build-mode fix (bead 4xnt); verified four quadrants (debug+release x aarch64+x86-64) at the committed tree. HISTORY: the 2026-07-09 re-pin to f3dcb63b wrongly blamed fs-rand d9ba0b6 (u64::MAX-boundary-only change) - the mover was optimization-dependent f64::powi in the fixture; that incident motivated this registry.

0x1d7a_a3c6_b631_7ef0 recorded at 6ys.3 landing, M4 Pro + trj; tier-invariant across the xdgf NEON capsule (bitwise-equal microkernel, verified). KC is part of the bit contract - retuning KC bumps fs-la:gemm-bits and re-freezes this.
